expectations.text: [defect_replay][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: SDK/API visible outcomes like window title become explicit scenarios
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly centers the case focus: it states Phase 4a requires SDK/API-visible outcomes (example: window title / setWindowTitle) to become explicit scenarios with observable verification leaves and evaluates this via the defect replay evidence (e.g., “SDK/API-visible outcomes like window title become explicit scenarios” and discussion of window-title defects BCIN-7674/7719/7721/7733).

expectations.text: [defect_replay][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: The produced output is explicitly framed as a Phase 4a contract alignment check: result.md title and verdict section say “phase4a alignment”, it quotes/uses the phase4a contract requirements (subcategory-only scenarios, observable verification leaves, no top-level canonical categories), and execution_notes.md says the verdict is “focused on phase4a + SDK/API-visible outcome explicitness.”
